name: ftpmanager
description: FTP/SFTP client for VS Code - connect, browse, edit and transfer files on remote servers

ftpmanager.viewLocation.markdownDescription: Controls where the FTPManager tree is shown. Use `explorer` to keep it in the Explorer panel, or `activityBar` to show it in its own Activity Bar view.

ftpmanager.language.markdownDescription: Controls the language used by FTPManager. Use `auto` to follow the VS Code display language.

ftpmanager.highlightActiveServer.markdownDescription: Highlights files and folders in the FTPManager tree that belong to the server of the active remote editor.

commands.title: ファイルをアップロード

colors.description: Foreground color used for FTPManager tree items that belong to the server of the active remote editor.

scripts.prepackage: pnpm --filter @ftpmanager/shared build && pnpm --filter @ftpmanager/webview-ui build && pnpm run build && cp ../../README.md ./README.md && cp ../../CHANGELOG.md ./CHANGELOG.md && mkdir -p ../../out
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run package && pnpm run publish:vsce && pnpm run publish:ovsx
scripts.vscode:prepublish: pnpm --filter @ftpmanager/shared build && pnpm --filter @ftpmanager/webview-ui build && pnpm run build
